title: Homalobus gibbsii

uses: Homalobus gibbsii is a plant species with reported medicinal uses, particularly in traditional medicine. It is believed to have antimalarial, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's extracts have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, wounds, and skin infections. The leaves and roots of Homalobus gibbsii are typically used for medicinal purposes. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential health benefits.
